name: Trigger Agent
description: Triggers the agent's transition loop. By default waits for the run cycle to complete. Set wait=false to return immediately while the agent runs in the background, or wait=<ms> for a timeout. If the agent is sleeping, starts the run loop — even with no pending work, since the transition function may act proactively. If already running, returns the existing run's future. The transition operation is always taken from the agent's config.operation.

wait.description: Wait policy: true (default, block until done), false (return immediately), or integer milliseconds (timeout)

status.description: Agent status: SLEEPING (completed) or RUNNING (if wait=false or timed out)

result.description: Result returned by the transition function (only when waited)
